step_rationale: Protease inhibitor preventing elastase-driven extracellular-matrix degradation.
mechanism: Alpha-1 antitrypsin inhibits neutrophil elastase and matrix metalloproteinases, protecting fibrous-cap integrity in atherosclerotic plaques.

references.title: Proteomic analysis of plasma from patients during an acute coronary syndrome.
references.journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology
